# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a single-page application (SPA) built with React and TypeScript, using Vite as the build tool. The application follows a component-based architecture with feature-based organization.

### Frontend Architecture
- **Framework**: React 18 with hooks-based state management
- **Routing**: React Router for client-side navigation
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens and shadcn/ui component library
- **State Management**: Local component state with some global state via React Context
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with validation

### Backend Integration
- **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL) with real-time capabilities
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth with role-based access control
- **API**: Direct Supabase client calls (no separate API layer)
- **File Storage**: Supabase Storage for documents and images

### Key Architectural Patterns
- **Component Composition**: Extensive use of compound components and render props
- **Custom Hooks**: Business logic abstracted into reusable hooks
- **Utility Functions**: Pure functions for data transformations and calculations
- **Type Safety**: Comprehensive TypeScript usage with generated Supabase types

## Core Business Logic

### Attendance Management
- Automated attendance tracking with check-in/check-out times
- Overtime calculation (regular and holiday)
- Late arrival detection and reporting
- Weekend/holiday work tracking
- Attendance summary analytics with employee rankings

### Leave Management
- Leave request workflow with approvals
- Balance tracking across multiple leave types
- Working days calculation excluding weekends and holidays
- Leave policy enforcement

### Payroll Processing
- Automated payroll generation based on attendance data
- Overtime pay calculations
- PDF invoice generation
- Salary history tracking

### Employee Management
- Profile management with avatar support
- Role-based permissions and access control
- Department and designation management
- Performance evaluations and salary reviews

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx`: Application bootstrap and root rendering
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Main dashboard/home page

### Core Components
- `src/components/AppLayout.tsx`: Main application layout with sidebar and navigation
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx`: Logo component with variant support
- `src/components/MandatoryPasswordChange.tsx`: Password reset modal for new users
- `src/components/AttendanceSummary.tsx`: Complex attendance analytics dashboard
- `src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx`: Reusable employee selection component

### Business Logic
- `src/lib/attendance-format.ts`: Time formatting utilities
- `src/lib/leave-utils.ts`: Leave balance and calculation functions
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Permission checking utilities
- `src/lib/notifications.ts`: Notification sending logic
- `src/lib/review-schedule.ts`: Performance review scheduling

### Integrations
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`: Supabase client configuration
- `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts`: Auto-generated TypeScript types

### Configuration
- `vite.config.ts`: Vite build configuration
- `tailwind.config.ts`: Tailwind CSS customization
- `supabase/config.toml`: Supabase project settings

## Database Schema Highlights

### Core Tables
- `employees`: Employee profiles and authentication links
- `attendance_records`: Daily attendance data with timestamps
- `leave_requests`: Leave applications with approval workflow
- `payroll_records`: Generated payroll data
- `companies`: Multi-tenant company information
- `departments`: Organizational structure
- `public_holidays`: Holiday calendar management

### Key Relationships
- Employees belong to companies and departments
- Attendance records link employees to daily time entries
- Leave requests reference employees and leave types
- Payroll records aggregate attendance data for compensation

## Development Workflow

### Code Organization
- Components are organized by feature (attendance/, leave/, payroll/)
- UI components follow shadcn/ui patterns with customization
- Business logic is separated into lib/ utilities
- Custom hooks handle complex stateful logic

### Testing Strategy
- Unit tests for utility functions and hooks
- E2E tests for critical user workflows
- Component testing for complex UI interactions

### Deployment
- Built with Vite for optimized production bundles
- Static hosting compatible (Vercel, Netlify, etc.)
- Environment-based configuration for different stages

## Security Considerations

- Authentication handled by Supabase Auth
- Row-level security (RLS) policies on database tables
- Client-side validation with server-side enforcement
- Secure file uploads through Supabase Storage
- Role-based access control throughout the application

## Performance Optimizations

- Lazy loading of routes and components
- Optimized bundle splitting with Vite
- Efficient data fetching with Supabase real-time subscriptions
- Memoized calculations for expensive operations
- Virtualized lists for large datasets
